title: DocContextly
description: An AI-powered knowledge workspace (Google NotebookLM Clone) that lets users upload PDFs, DOCX, websites, YouTube videos, and more to chat with their content using RAG. Generate summaries, quizzes, flashcards, mind maps, slide decks, and AI podcast-style voiceovers with asynchronous background processing powered by Redis, ARQ, and Qdrant vector search.

title: AgenticResearch
description: A full-stack multi-agent AI research assistant powered by LangGraph that validates topics, asks clarifying questions, searches the web, synthesizes structured research reports, and performs self-critique. Features resumable workflows, real-time progress streaming with Server-Sent Events (SSE), Clerk authentication, PDF export, and PostgreSQL-backed checkpointing.

title: Code2DSA
description: 🚀 An AI-powered LeetCode-like coding platform where users can solve DSA problems with real-time code execution, multi-test case submissions, authentication, submission history, and profile-based performance tracking. Includes an AI code reviewer that analyzes solutions, provides feedback, and suggests improvements 🤖📊.

title: DigiLibrary
description: A scalable multi-vendor digital library backend enabling users to upload, publish, read, and purchase book PDFs (free & paid). Implemented JWT authentication, Stripe payments, secure file handling with ImageKit, book CRUD with advanced querying using MongoDB Aggregation and pagination.

title: Reel Blast
description: 🚀 A full-stack social platform where users can upload, explore, and engage with trending short-form videos, built for seamless video sharing and a dynamic user experience 🎥🔥. It includes features such as authentication, uploading, editing, deleting, and saving reels, as well as sharing and commenting on reels, creating user accounts, and following creators

title: AI Powered Finite Autometa Editor and Simulator
description: ✨ A full-stack AI platform to Design, visualize, and simulate Deterministic and Non-deterministic Finite Automata | Convert Regex to DFA and NFA | AI Assistant for Finite Automata 🌟🌟🌟 Used fastApi & Langchain for backend and NextJs for frontEnd

title: Social Blogging Website
description: A full-stack social blogging platform where users can read posts/blogs written by others and also write their own. The platform includes features like user authentication, categories, and the ability to add, edit, or delete blogs/posts. Built using React for the frontend and Appwrite as the backend.

title: Furniture E-Commerce Platform
description: This furniture website provides users with a seamless shopping experience to browse and purchase furniture items. It combines a responsive frontend with dynamic backend capabilities powered by Sanity CMS to ensure efficient content management and order processing.

title: Art School Website
description: This is an Art School website built with Next.js and TypeScript, using the Accenterity UI library for the frontend. The website is designed to provide information about courses, instructors, and upcoming webinars. It is deployed on Vercel for fast and efficient hosting.

title: Online learning platform Website
description: A Multipage Online learning platform website with custom css

title: React Notes App
description: A simple and functional notes app built with React that allows users to add, delete, search, and categorize notes. The app also features customizable background colors for notes and uses local storage to persist data.

title: Quran40 - audio player
description: Quran40:Listen and Read the Holy Quran with Translation in 40+ languages.---This project offers a user-friendly platform to engage with the Holy Quran through an interactive audio player and comprehensive multilingual support.

title: Coding Quiz Site
description: This is a web-based coding quiz platform built using HTML, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript. It offers a variety of coding challenges to test your knowledge and skills in different programming languages and concepts.

title: E-commerce Landing Page
description: Figma to NextJs ecommerce website landing page.
